tooltip.gytrinket.drone_module_desc:
Allows building drone constructs
Max Count: %d  Health: %d  Damage: %.1f  Attack Speed: %.0f/s
Drone is a Standard Construct
tooltip.gytrinket.shield_type.none_desc: Can additionally stack properties of the same type of shield
tooltip.gytrinket.shield_type.aura_desc: Burn nearby enemies and ignite them. (If ignite damage isn't specified, default is %.1f/s damage for %d seconds)
tooltip.gytrinket.shield_type.reflect_de: Reflect projectiles that hit you. Reflected projectiles speed increases by %d%%, damage is affected by shield effect
tooltip.gytrinket.shield_type.amplificat: Increases attack damage by %d%%. Amplification increases when enemies are nearby. Cap at %d%%. Shield effect provides both base amount and cap. Provides %d%% movement speed when shield is active (affected by shield effect)
tooltip.gytrinket.shield_type.warp_desc: When shield breaks, teleport in facing direction. Explosions at teleport start and end points deal %.1f explosion damage
tooltip.gytrinket.shield_type.siphon_des: Every %d ticks, deals %.1f damage to nearby enemies and recovers %d%% of damage dealt as shield. (Damage is evenly distributed among enemies) Siphoning continuously increases shield effect and shield effect radius, up to %d%%. Quickly decays when no targets are present.
tooltip.gytrinket.adaptive_armor_effect: Taking damage generates armor stacks. Each armor stack provides damage reduction
tooltip.gytrinket.adaptive_armor_bond_ef: Armor stacks additionally provide shield effect and recovery efficiency properties
tooltip.gytrinket.electric_discharge_eff: Player attacks generate electric arcs that burn nearby enemies. Slower attack speed means longer arcs and higher damage
tooltip.gytrinket.efficiency_effect: When player is not in attack cooldown, provides %s%% independent multiplier shield cooldown reduction and recovery efficiency properties
tooltip.gytrinket.barrier_effect: When shield takes damage exceeding %d points, the damage is limited to %d
tooltip.gytrinket.regen_shield_effect: Enables shield natural recovery. When shield has value, player health regeneration efficiency is %d%%, shield regeneration efficiency is %d%%. When shield has no value, regeneration efficiency is 100%%
tooltip.gytrinket.reflect_damage_effect: When shield takes damage, fires burning particles toward the attacker. Burns and ignites enemies
tooltip.gytrinket.explosive_shield_effec: When shield breaks, deals %.1f explosion damage to nearby enemies
tooltip.gytrinket.shield_transfer_effect: Shield no longer protects you, but protects your constructs (you can use Shield Receiver to additionally protect other entities). Each protected entity reduces shield effect and shield effect radius by %.1f%%
tooltip.gytrinket.binary_protocol_effect: When shield takes damage, player takes %d%% of the damage for the shield (or vice versa)
tooltip.gytrinket.weaponized_shield_effe: While shield is active, apply %d%% vulnerability to nearby enemies (affected by shield effect attributes)
tooltip.gytrinket.near_death_protection_: When drone is about to die, prevents death, restores 1 health and grants invulnerability for %.1f seconds. Cooldown: %.1f seconds (per drone)
tooltip.gytrinket.near_death_explosion_e: When drone is about to die, prevents death, restores 1 health and grants invulnerability for %.1f seconds. Leaves formation and charges at enemies to self-destruct (damage = max health × speed × %.1f, radius %.1f blocks). Forced self-destruct when invulnerability ends
tooltip.gytrinket.pursuit_array_effect: Upgrades drones to assault drones and unlocks Pursuit Array (press Tab to switch arrays). Drones in Pursuit Array have increased attack speed
tooltip.gytrinket.formation_array_effect: Unlocks Formation Array. Drones in Formation Array have increased damage, decreased attack speed, and switch to beam cannon attacks
tooltip.gytrinket.commander_effect: Automatically appoints the healthiest drone as Commander (max %d). Appointment delay: %.1f seconds. Commanders gain bonus health and damage
tooltip.gytrinket.guard_array_effect: Unlocks Guard Array. Defense drones in Guard Array concentrate between the player and the nearest enemy to intercept attacks
tooltip.gytrinket.arc_barrier_effect: When a defense drone is between the player and the damage source, the drone intercepts the damage. Position deviation threshold: %.1f blocks
tooltip.gytrinket.reshaping_effect: Defense drones regenerate %.1f%% max health per second. Defense drones generate armor shards on death. Absorbing armor shards grants %.1f%% damage reduction for %.1f seconds
tooltip.gytrinket.counter_pulse_effect: Defense drones trigger counter pulse every %.1f seconds, dealing %.1f explosion damage to enemies within %.1f blocks. Charges up when not triggered (every %d ticks, max %d layers). Immediately triggers on taking damage, bypassing cooldown
tooltip.gytrinket.precision_construct_ef: Each player level provides %.2f%% independent multiplier construct build speed
tooltip.gytrinket.advanced_engineering_e: Each player level provides %.1f%% independent multiplier drone health and drone damage
tooltip.gytrinket.assault_effect: Hold left click to auto-attack. Attack speed gradually increases. Takes self-damage (increases with attack speed). -60% movement speed while assaulting
tooltip.gytrinket.charged_attack_effect: Hold left click to charge, release to attack. Charge has no cap but is limited by drag. Damage = current damage + charge value. -20% movement speed while charging
tooltip.gytrinket.charged_shield_effect: While charging, gain dynamic shield effect and radius bonus (%s%% of charge, max %s%%). Fades quickly after releasing. Additional -15% movement speed while charging
tooltip.gytrinket.grudge_effect: While charging, each point of health or shield lost grants %s charge rate. Always decaying (%s + %s%% of current value per tick). Clears on release. Additional -15% movement speed while charging

advancements.gytrinket.story.obtain_basi: Hey you know? Press G to open the mod menu!
advancements.gytrinket.story.obtain_refl: Not only reflect, but also strengthen and hit back!
advancements.gytrinket.story.obtain_ampl: Originally intended to be stronger than vanilla, but I don't want to adjust the values
advancements.gytrinket.story.obtain_warp: Why do entities have teleportation protection but I don't? Yes I'm biased
advancements.gytrinket.story.obtain_shie: A diamond for your shield boost, do you think it's worth it?
Do not provide shield to your enemies!
advancements.gytrinket.story.obtain_defe: Can it block remote and local attacks? That's the question!
advancements.gytrinket.story.obtain_arc_: Be careful when the expert is not around
advancements.gytrinket.story.obtain_assa: There are always flies buzzing around
advancements.gytrinket.story.obtain_ulti: If My Shield Breaks, I Die
Giving up so much health at such a young age. (Is health really that bad?)

tooltip.gytrinket.self_destruct_effect: Constructs explode when destroyed. Explosion power scales with the construct's max health
tooltip.gytrinket.taskmaster_effect: Gain x%% construct build speed, -x%% independent movement speed. x=2×(standard limit+advanced limit). Disables attack modes
command.gytrinket.resetlevel.success: Light Point Level has been reset
command.gytrinket.resetlevel.not_player: This command can only be executed by a player
